behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction lists all 5 file paths, describes the v1→v2 API migration patterns, and the Verification section explicitly enumerates the forbidden patterns (new Resource(, SEMRESATTRS_*, addSpanProcessor, .register(), parentSpanId) that tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what APIs are deprecated without naming exact replacements (e.g., says 'factory function to produce Resource instances' rather than 'resourceFromAttributes').

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for v2 API patterns (resourceFromAttributes, spanProcessors, setGlobalTracerProvider, ATTR_SERVICE_NAME) which are the canonical v2 names, not gold-specific variable names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Node.js scripts that import v2 packages and instantiate BasicTracerProvider/resourceFromAttributes at runtime, plus run prettier and babel parser subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require both positive presence of v2 patterns and absence of v1 patterns in specific files, and runtime execution of the v2 initialization — a stub cannot satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each Verification bullet in instruction maps to a test check (no new Resource(, no SEMRESATTRS_*, no addSpanProcessor, no .register(), README prettier).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Pass-to-pass static, Pass-to-pass repo_tests, Fail-to-pass pr_diff) and descriptively named.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and API names match repo conventions and OTel v2 API.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify (which is necessary scoping) but doesn't pinpoint exact lines or replacement code.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code/docs migration task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
